name: Shrimp & Scallop Kabobs
recipeIngredient: Pound Sea Scallops, Cut In Half
One and a Half Teaspoons Ground Ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein shrimp.
2. Drain pineapple chunks.
3. Use imported soy sauce if available for better taste; otherwise, use domestic soy sauce.
4. In a medium bowl, combine oil, lemon juice, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, and onion powder; mix well.
5. Add shrimp and scallops. Cover; refrigerate 3 hours or overnight.
6. Place shrimp, scallops, pineapple, and zucchini on bamboo skewers that have soaked in water for 1 hour, or on metal skewers.
7. Grill or broil for 3 to 6 minutes per side until shrimp are pink, basting frequently with marinade.
8. Refrigerate leftovers.
